name: io.github.saajunaid/junai-mcp
title: junai Pipeline MCP
description: Agentic pipeline orchestration MCP server for AI-driven development workflows.

environmentVariables.name: PIPELINE_STATE_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to pipeline-state.json. Defaults to .github/pipeline-state.json relative to the workspace root (detected by searching upward from the current directory for a .github folder).

environmentVariables.name: JUNAI_WORKSPACE_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Explicit workspace root path override. Use if automatic detection (searching upward for .github) does not find the correct root.
